title: senecio humilis
intro: Senecio humilis, also known as groundsel or common groundsel, is a small to medium-sized annual or biennial plant that belongs to the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Senecio humilis include its ability to act as a digestive aid, a diuretic, and a treatment for various skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, Senecio humilis is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
